title: 5 tips for using Antigravity 2.0 on enterprise codebases, planning phase
summary: Google Cloud Tech presents five planning tactics for using Antigravity 2.0 agents on existing enterprise codebases: breaking repo walls to link multiple repositories, organizing hierarchical coding standards, containing blast radius through sandboxing and allowlists, using voice input for context, and leveraging interrogation commands to surface fuzzy requirements before code generation begins.
